-- This file is auto-generated by src/server/schema.test.ts
-- Do not edit manually. To regenerate:
--   UPDATE_SCHEMA=true pnpm test src/server/schema.test.ts

TABLE: convo
  Columns:
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY
    source_url TEXT NOT NULL
    inbox_id INTEGER NOT NULL
    messages_json TEXT NOT NULL
  Foreign keys:
    inbox_id -> inbox(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION
  Indexes:
    idx_convo_inbox_id (inbox_id)

TABLE: inbox
  Columns:
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
    display_name TEXT NOT NULL
    sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
  Indexes:
    sqlite_autoindex_inbox_1 UNIQUE (display_name)

TABLE: inbox_providers
  Columns:
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
    inbox_id INTEGER NOT NULL
    provider_id INTEGER NOT NULL
    query TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
  Foreign keys:
    provider_id -> providers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    inbox_id -> inbox(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE NO ACTION
  Indexes:
    idx_inbox_providers_provider_id (provider_id)
    idx_inbox_providers_inbox_id (inbox_id)
    sqlite_autoindex_inbox_providers_1 UNIQUE (inbox_id, provider_id, query)

TABLE: providers
  Columns:
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
    secrets_value TEXT NOT NULL
    type TEXT NOT NULL
    identity TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'
